info.title: DireWolfVPS agent surface
info.description: Action contracts for autonomous AI agents to provision since-2018 offshore, no-KYC KVM VPS infrastructure via DireWolfVPS. Agents authenticate with a Bearer API key, can fund their balance with crypto, and can settle USDC on Base gaslessly using x402.
info.x-brand-positioning: Since-2018 offshore, no-KYC, crypto-paid VPS for privacy-conscious users and autonomous AI agents.

flows.title: Deploy a VPS funded with crypto
flows.description: End-to-end: create an account, read the catalog, top up the balance in crypto, wait for confirmation, then order a clean-IP KVM server. With x402 (USDC on Base) the whole flow needs no human.

parameters.name: coin
parameters.description: Funding coin: BTC, XMR, ETH, LTC, USDTTRC, USDT, or USDCBASE for gasless x402

parameters.name: plan
parameters.description: Plan id from the catalog (pup … fenrir)

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Location id: nl, fr, ro, bg, se, is, ch, my

flows.title: Fund the balance gaslessly with x402 (USDC on Base)
flows.description: Create an account, request a USDC-on-Base top-up (HTTP 402 with an x402 'accepts' block), sign the EIP-3009 authorization, and re-send with the X-PAYMENT header. Settlement is gasless for the agent; the balance credits after the swap confirms.

flows.title: Inspect and manage servers
flows.description: List servers, read one, and reveal root credentials to connect over SSH.

x402.flow: POST /api/v1/account for a Bearer api_key; POST /api/v1/topups with 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' and 'X-Payment-Mode: x402' (or coin=USDCBASE) to receive an HTTP 402 'accepts' block; sign the EIP-3009 USDC authorization and re-send the same request with the 'X-PAYMENT' header. Settlement is gasless for the agent; the balance credits after the swap confirms.
